TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ti Akira lja Suzuki (鈴木 章/ すずき あきら Suzuki Akira, 1930.9.12- ) Suzuki Akira, sinipualjak i 1930 a cavilj a kugacu a tapuluq kata drusa a qadavan, a sinsi a kinkiu tua 化學i ripun timadju, izua a pungadanngadan a sinsi uta i 北海道大學 timadaju, saka sedjumak timadju ta "鈴木反應", qaw pakaleva tjiamatju ta "文化勳章"kata "kinisamuljam nua kakudan " masa a kinasamuljan nimadju tua patjara "kemudakuda a 鈀催化交叉偶聯反應 na有機合成 "sa pinakalevavan ta "諾貝爾化學獎"kata 理察·赫克, 根岸英一ka 2010 a cavilj. kasucuayanga a sikavaljutan kata sinupuan kemasi a i ripun timadju. nu daygakuanga timadju, kisupuanga ta katupu a "有機化學手冊" nua Louis Fieser kata "硼氫化"(Hydroboration) na 赫爾伯特·布朗, sa papaqenetj tjiamadju a macepeliv a sugaku tua kitulu ta 化學, saka kitjaulanga i daygaku a 北海道大學, qaw qemacuvung ta hakasi nua 北大理學timadju nu navinecikanga ta lunubn a "氫化菲衍生物的合成" ka 1960 a cavilj. ka 1961 a cavilj, masananga ta sinsi a 助理教授 timadju i 北大工學部, sa masan ta sinsi a kisanvenarung ka 1973 a cavilj. izua a tjelu a cavilj a kemasi 1963 a cavilj, tinulu a Suzuki Akira na 赫爾伯特·布朗 i daygaku a 普渡大學 i amilika, sa kitulutulu ta 有機硼化合物 timadju, mavananga a tjatjas nua kinasamuljan nimadju nutjaivirilj. sengsengan ka 1970 a cavilj, kituluanan ti Suzuki Akira ta 偶聯反應 i daygaku a 北大, sa napacun kata kemeljang a "鈴木反應" timadju, qaw pakeljang ta zuma ka 1979 a cavilj. azua a "鈴木反應" a sikaqeljing a ravac a pucemel ta saqetjuan a 癌症, 愛滋病, kata malang ta 液晶, avan a manguanguaq nua 有機合成化學 kata 材料科學. nakinemnem timadju tua azua a "鈴木反應" mavananga a kinudan nua aicu a kuga nimadju, sa inika kinudan nimadju a macidilj. masa a kemudan na Suzuki Akira, saka maqati a tinulu a "偶聯反應" na zuma, manguaq tua tjuruvu a caucau patjetucu. ka 1994 a cavilj, qemacuvung a sengsengan timadju i 北大理學部 a drusa a cavilj kata 工學部 a tjelu a puluq kata drusa a qecev na cavilj, sa masananga ta pungadanngadan a sinsi i 北大. saka temulu timadju i daygaku i 岡山理科大學 kata 倉敷藝術科學大學 patje a 2002 a cavilj. katjivirilj ta 2009 a cavilj, temulu timadju kata 根岸英一 i daygaku i 國立臺灣大學 tua ita a cavilj, sa pinakalevavan timadju ta "諾貝爾化學獎" kata 理察·赫克, 根岸英一 ka 2010 a cavilj a ziugacu a unem a qadavan. masa a patalidu ta 聯合國教科文組織(UNESCO)a 國際化學年 nua 2011 a cavilj, sa pinakalevavan tjai Suzuki Akira tua UNESCO官刊"教科文組織信使"a kitjaucikel, kata masananga a vinecikan a "a tigami tua maqacuvucuvung a 化學家" a kipasasevalit. pinakalevavan ka 1986 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "Weissberger-Williams Lectureship Award" ka 1987 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "韓國化學會功勞獎" ka 1989 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "日本化學會獎" ka 1995 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "DowElanco Lectureship Award" ka 2000 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "The H. C. Brown Lecture Award" ka 2003 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta " " ka 2004 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "日本學士院獎(patjara kitulu ta )" ka 2009 a cavilj- pinakalevavan tua masan ta ka 2009 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "Paul Karrer Gold Medal" (katjaivirilj ta中西香爾, avan a masannusalj a caucau i ripun) ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "諾貝爾化學獎(patjara kitulu ta )" ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "kinisamuljam nua kakudan " ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "文化勳章" ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "北海道功勞獎別獎" ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan tua masan ta鵡川町特別名譽町民 ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "鵡川町特別功勞獎" ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "江別市特別榮譽獎" ka 2011 a cavilj- pinakalevavan tua masan ta日本學士院會員. ka 2012 a cavilj- pinakalevavan tua masan ta ka 2016 a cavilj- pinakalevavan tua sikamasanitalj a qinavu nimadju -ka 2010 a cavilj a ziugacu a unem a qadavan, uri pinakalevavan a 諾貝爾化學獎 tjai Suzuki Akira, qaw qivu timadju: "ika masalu aken!" nu mangtjez ta 記者 i umaqan nimadju. -naqivu a malailaing ti 蓮舫 ka 2009 a cavilj ta: "mavan a kisasusu angata ta masanitalj a sasupuin nua ripun? inia maqati a masanmusalj? " saka, kirivuan ti Suzuki Akira, "sa inika kemeljang a 科學 timadju!" "nu kitulutulu, mavan a kisasusu tua masanitalj, akumaya a masanmusalj? avan a kulugan a kivadaq!" -ka 2010 a cavilj a ziunigacu a alu a qadavan, naqivu ti Suzuki Akira i daydaku a 斯德哥爾摩大學, tucu a cemel ta pucemel a qizingan na djamuq , izua a 鈴木反應 ljawa ika sinipukeljangan nimadja, sa maqati a cemekauanan.
S.PHON: ti akira ʎa suzuki (** */ *** *** suzuki akira, ****.*.**- ) suzuki akira, sinipuaʎak i **** a ʦaviʎ a kugaʦu a tapuɭuq kata ɖusa a qadavan, a sinsi a kinkiu tua **i ripun timaɉu, izua a puŋadanŋadan a sinsi uta i ***** timadaju, saka səɉumak timaɉu ta "****", qaw pakaɭəva ʦiamaʦu ta "****"kata "kinisamuʎam nua kakudan " masa a kinasamuʎan nimaɉu tua paʦara "kəmudakuda a ********* na**** "sa pinakaɭəvavan ta "******"kata *****, ****ka **** a ʦaviʎ. kasuʦuajaŋa a sikavaʎutan kata sinupuan kəmasi a i ripun timaɉu. nu dajgakuaŋa timaɉu, kisupuaŋa ta katupu a "******" nua ɭuuis *iəsər kata "***"(hjɖuburatiun) na *******, sa papaqənəʦ ʦiamaɉu a maʦəpəɭiv a sugaku tua kituɭu ta **, saka kiʦauɭaŋa i dajgaku a *****, qaw qəmaʦuvuŋ ta hakasi nua ****timaɉu nu navinəʦikaŋa ta ɭunubn a "*********" ka **** a ʦaviʎ. ka **** a ʦaviʎ, masanaŋa ta sinsi a **** timaɉu i *****, sa masan ta sinsi a kisanvənaruŋ ka **** a ʦaviʎ. izua a ʦəɭu a ʦaviʎ a kəmasi **** a ʦaviʎ, tinuɭu a suzuki akira na ******* i dajgaku a **** i amiɭika, sa kituɭutuɭu ta ****** timaɉu, mavanaŋa a ʦaʦas nua kinasamuʎan nimaɉu nuʦaiviriʎ. səŋsəŋan ka **** a ʦaviʎ, kituɭuanan ti suzuki akira ta **** i dajgaku a **, sa napaʦun kata kəməʎaŋ a "****" timaɉu, qaw pakəʎaŋ ta zuma ka **** a ʦaviʎ. azua a "****" a sikaqəʎiŋ a ravaʦ a puʦəməɭ ta saqəʦuan a **, ***, kata maɭaŋ ta **, avan a maŋuaŋuaq nua ****** kata ****. nakinəmnəm timaɉu tua azua a "****" mavanaŋa a kinudan nua aiʦu a kuga nimaɉu, sa inika kinudan nimaɉu a maʦidiʎ. masa a kəmudan na suzuki akira, saka maqati a tinuɭu a "****" na zuma, maŋuaq tua ʦuruvu a ʦauʦau paʦətuʦu. ka **** a ʦaviʎ, qəmaʦuvuŋ a səŋsəŋan timaɉu i ***** a ɖusa a ʦaviʎ kata *** a ʦəɭu a puɭuq kata ɖusa a qəʦəv na ʦaviʎ, sa masanaŋa ta puŋadanŋadan a sinsi i **. saka təmuɭu timaɉu i dajgaku i ****** kata ******** paʦə a **** a ʦaviʎ. kaʦiviriʎ ta **** a ʦaviʎ, təmuɭu timaɉu kata **** i dajgaku i ****** tua ita a ʦaviʎ, sa pinakaɭəvavan timaɉu ta "******" kata *****, **** ka **** a ʦaviʎ a ziugaʦu a unəm a qadavan. masa a pataɭidu ta ********(unəsʦu)a ***** nua **** a ʦaviʎ, sa pinakaɭəvavan ʦai suzuki akira tua unəsʦu**"*******"a kiʦauʦikəɭ, kata masanaŋa a vinəʦikan a "a tigami tua maqaʦuvuʦuvuŋ a ***" a kipasasəvaɭit. pinakaɭəvavan ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "wəissbərgər-wiɭɭiams ɭəʦturəship award" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "********" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "******" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "duwəɭanʦu ɭəʦturəship award" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "thə h. ʦ. bruwn ɭəʦturə award" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta " " ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "******(paʦara kituɭu ta )" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan tua masan ta ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "pauɭ karrər guɭd mədaɭ" (kaʦaiviriʎ ta****, avan a masannusaʎ a ʦauʦau i ripun) ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "******(paʦara kituɭu ta )" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "kinisamuʎam nua kakudan " ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "****" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "********" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan tua masan ta********* ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "********" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "********" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan tua masan ta*******. ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan tua masan ta ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan tua sikamasanitaʎ a qinavu nimaɉu -ka **** a ʦaviʎ a ziugaʦu a unəm a qadavan, uri pinakaɭəvavan a ****** ʦai suzuki akira, qaw qivu timaɉu: "ika masaɭu akən!" nu maŋʦəz ta ** i umaqan nimaɉu. -naqivu a maɭaiɭaiŋ ti ** ka **** a ʦaviʎ ta: "mavan a kisasusu aŋata ta masanitaʎ a sasupuin nua ripun? inia maqati a masanmusaʎ? " saka, kirivuan ti suzuki akira, "sa inika kəməʎaŋ a ** timaɉu!" "nu kituɭutuɭu, mavan a kisasusu tua masanitaʎ, akumaja a masanmusaʎ? avan a kuɭugan a kivadaq!" -ka **** a ʦaviʎ a ziunigaʦu a aɭu a qadavan, naqivu ti suzuki akira i dajdaku a *******, tuʦu a ʦəməɭ ta puʦəməɭ a qiziŋan na ɉamuq , izua a **** ʎawa ika sinipukəʎaŋan nimaɉa, sa maqati a ʦəməkauanan.
S.FORM: ti Akira lja Suzuki (鈴木 章/ すずき あきら Suzuki Akira, 1930.9.12- ) Suzuki Akira, sinipualjak i 1930 a cavilj a kugacu a tapuluq kata drusa a qadavan, a sinsi a kinkiu tua 化學i ripun timadju, izua a pungadanngadan a sinsi uta i 北海道大學 timadaju, saka sedjumak timadju ta "鈴木反應", qaw pakaleva tjiamatju ta "文化勳章"kata "kinisamuljam nua kakudan " masa a kinasamuljan nimadju tua patjara "kemudakuda a 鈀催化交叉偶聯反應 na有機合成 "sa pinakalevavan ta "諾貝爾化學獎"kata 理察·赫克, 根岸英一ka 2010 a cavilj. kasucuayanga a sikavaljutan kata sinupuan kemasi a i ripun timadju. nu daygakuanga timadju, kisupuanga ta katupu a "有機化學手冊" nua Louis Fieser kata "硼氫化"(Hydroboration) na 赫爾伯特·布朗, sa papaqenetj tjiamadju a macepeliv a sugaku tua kitulu ta 化學, saka kitjaulanga i daygaku a 北海道大學, qaw qemacuvung ta hakasi nua 北大理學timadju nu navinecikanga ta lunubn a "氫化菲衍生物的合成" ka 1960 a cavilj. ka 1961 a cavilj, masananga ta sinsi a 助理教授 timadju i 北大工學部, sa masan ta sinsi a kisanvenarung ka 1973 a cavilj. izua a tjelu a cavilj a kemasi 1963 a cavilj, tinulu a Suzuki Akira na 赫爾伯特·布朗 i daygaku a 普渡大學 i amilika, sa kitulutulu ta 有機硼化合物 timadju, mavananga a tjatjas nua kinasamuljan nimadju nutjaivirilj. sengsengan ka 1970 a cavilj, kituluanan ti Suzuki Akira ta 偶聯反應 i daygaku a 北大, sa napacun kata kemeljang a "鈴木反應" timadju, qaw pakeljang ta zuma ka 1979 a cavilj. azua a "鈴木反應" a sikaqeljing a ravac a pucemel ta saqetjuan a 癌症, 愛滋病, kata malang ta 液晶, avan a manguanguaq nua 有機合成化學 kata 材料科學. nakinemnem timadju tua azua a "鈴木反應" mavananga a kinudan nua aicu a kuga nimadju, sa inika kinudan nimadju a macidilj. masa a kemudan na Suzuki Akira, saka maqati a tinulu a "偶聯反應" na zuma, manguaq tua tjuruvu a caucau patjetucu. ka 1994 a cavilj, qemacuvung a sengsengan timadju i 北大理學部 a drusa a cavilj kata 工學部 a tjelu a puluq kata drusa a qecev na cavilj, sa masananga ta pungadanngadan a sinsi i 北大. saka temulu timadju i daygaku i 岡山理科大學 kata 倉敷藝術科學大學 patje a 2002 a cavilj. katjivirilj ta 2009 a cavilj, temulu timadju kata 根岸英一 i daygaku i 國立臺灣大學 tua ita a cavilj, sa pinakalevavan timadju ta "諾貝爾化學獎" kata 理察·赫克, 根岸英一 ka 2010 a cavilj a ziugacu a unem a qadavan. masa a patalidu ta 聯合國教科文組織(UNESCO)a 國際化學年 nua 2011 a cavilj, sa pinakalevavan tjai Suzuki Akira tua UNESCO官刊"教科文組織信使"a kitjaucikel, kata masananga a vinecikan a "a tigami tua maqacuvucuvung a 化學家" a kipasasevalit. pinakalevavan ka 1986 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "Weissberger-Williams Lectureship Award" ka 1987 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "韓國化學會功勞獎" ka 1989 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "日本化學會獎" ka 1995 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "DowElanco Lectureship Award" ka 2000 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "The H. C. Brown Lecture Award" ka 2003 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta " " ka 2004 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "日本學士院獎(patjara kitulu ta )" ka 2009 a cavilj- pinakalevavan tua masan ta ka 2009 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "Paul Karrer Gold Medal" (katjaivirilj ta中西香爾, avan a masannusalj a caucau i ripun) ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "諾貝爾化學獎(patjara kitulu ta )" ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "kinisamuljam nua kakudan " ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "文化勳章" ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "北海道功勞獎別獎" ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan tua masan ta鵡川町特別名譽町民 ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "鵡川町特別功勞獎" ka 2010 a cavilj- pinakalevavan ta "江別市特別榮譽獎" ka 2011 a cavilj- pinakalevavan tua masan ta日本學士院會員. ka 2012 a cavilj- pinakalevavan tua masan ta ka 2016 a cavilj- pinakalevavan tua sikamasanitalj a qinavu nimadju -ka 2010 a cavilj a ziugacu a unem a qadavan, uri pinakalevavan a 諾貝爾化學獎 tjai Suzuki Akira, qaw qivu timadju: "ika masalu aken!" nu mangtjez ta 記者 i umaqan nimadju. -naqivu a malailaing ti 蓮舫 ka 2009 a cavilj ta: "mavan a kisasusu angata ta masanitalj a sasupuin nua ripun? inia maqati a masanmusalj? " saka, kirivuan ti Suzuki Akira, "sa inika kemeljang a 科學 timadju!" "nu kitulutulu, mavan a kisasusu tua masanitalj, akumaya a masanmusalj? avan a kulugan a kivadaq!" -ka 2010 a cavilj a ziunigacu a alu a qadavan, naqivu ti Suzuki Akira i daydaku a 斯德哥爾摩大學, tucu a cemel ta pucemel a qizingan na djamuq , izua a 鈴木反應 ljawa ika sinipukeljangan nimadja, sa maqati a cemekauanan.

puŋadanŋadan a sinsi uta i ***** timadaju, saka səɉumak timaɉu ta "****", qaw pakaɭəva ʦiamaʦu ta "****"kata "kinisamuʎam nua kakudan " masa a kinasamuʎan nimaɉu tua paʦara "kəmudakuda a ********* **. saka təmuɭu timaɉu i dajgaku i ****** kata ******** paʦə a **** a ʦaviʎ. kaʦiviriʎ ta **** a ʦaviʎ, təmuɭu timaɉu kata **** i dajgaku i ****** tua ita a ʦaviʎ, sa pinakaɭəvavan timaɉu ta "******" kata *****, **** ka **** a ʦaviʎ a ziugaʦu a unəm a qadavan. masa a pataɭidu ta ********(unəsʦu)a ***** nua **** a ʦaviʎ, sa pinakaɭəvavan ʦai suzuki akira tua unəsʦu**"*******"a kiʦauʦikəɭ, kata masanaŋa a vinəʦikan a "a tigami tua maqaʦuvuʦuvuŋ a ***" a kipasasəvaɭit. pinakaɭəvavan ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "wəissbərgər-wiɭɭiams ɭəʦturəship award" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "********" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "******" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "duwəɭanʦu ɭəʦturəship award" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "thə h. ʦ. bruwn ɭəʦturə award" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta " " ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "******(paʦara kituɭu ta )" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan tua masan ta ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "pauɭ karrər guɭd mədaɭ" (kaʦaiviriʎ ta****, avan a masannusaʎ a ʦauʦau i ripun) ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "******(paʦara kituɭu ta )" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "kinisamuʎam nua kakudan " ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "****" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "********" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan tua masan ta********* ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "********" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan ta "********" ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan tua masan ta*******. ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan tua masan ta ka **** a ʦaviʎ- pinakaɭəvavan tua sikamasanitaʎ a qinavu nimaɉu -ka **** a ʦaviʎ a ziugaʦu a unəm a qadavan, uri pinakaɭəvavan a ****** ʦai suzuki akira, qaw qivu timaɉu: "ika masaɭu akən!" nu maŋʦəz ta ** i umaqan nimaɉu. -naqivu a maɭaiɭaiŋ ti ** ka **** a ʦaviʎ ta: "mavan a kisasusu aŋata ta masanitaʎ a sasupuin nua ripun? inia maqati a masanmusaʎ? " saka, kirivuan ti suzuki akira, "sa inika kəməʎaŋ a ** timaɉu!" "nu kituɭutuɭu, mavan a kisasusu tua masanitaʎ, akumaja a masanmusaʎ? avan a kuɭugan a kivadaq!" -ka **** a ʦaviʎ a ziunigaʦu a aɭu a qadavan, naqivu ti suzuki akira i dajdaku a *******, tuʦu a ʦəməɭ ta puʦəməɭ a qiziŋan na ɉamuq , izua a **** ʎawa ika sinipukəʎaŋan nimaɉa, sa maqati a ʦəməkauanan.
